name: Emoji Spec Agent
description: A task-focused agent that generates structured, platform-specific emoji design specifications (colors, shapes, outlines, unique traits) from free-text emotional descriptions, using RAG over style guides and an LLM-as-judge evaluator.
target_audience: Product Designers, UX Researchers, Emoji/Icon Designers, Platform Design Teams
tasks_capable_of_performing: Emotion and Gesture Recognition from Free Text
Style Guide Retrieval and Application per Platform
examples_of_suitable_questions: אימוג'י של רובוט עם עיניים כחולות מרובעות
